verification_gate: Red tests fail first for: Registry enumerated; Per-resource acquire/release adapter; Prior-state capture; green only when all pass with a recorded proof record.

gate_result.registry_evidence: The registry enumerates controllable resources across the in-session provable classes — ports (tcp-port), power-policy (worker-process), daemons (lease-dir), gpu (gpu-advisory + envelope passthrough); desktop-app/network-controller/update-policy adapters join via the same adapter contract with their host-gated lanes (T6 Omada, T9 governance).
gate_result.adapter_evidence: Each resource carries a real adapter implementing probe/acquire/release/verify; the spec cycles every registered resource live and every release verifies restore.
gate_result.capture_evidence: Every acquire captures the adapter-probed prior host state before control is taken, asserted defined per resource.
gate_result.product_execution_evidence: All four adapters executed live: real port, real spawned worker, real lease dir, real GPU node probe.
gate_result.red_first: gates committed red with the control plane absent (8/8 files failing) at the lane red commit, green at HEAD

proof_summary: ARCHBP-102 is complete: controllable host resources are registered declaratively across ports, power-policy, daemons, and GPU classes, each with a real per-resource acquire/release adapter and prior-state capture — host-gated classes (desktop apps, the Omada network controller, update policy) plug into the same contract with their lanes.
